message:
refactor(examples): apply clippy lint fixes to demo_benchmark

- Replace .map(format!).collect::<String>() with .fold() + fmt::Write
  for building hash input strings, avoiding clippy::format_collect and
  reducing intermediate allocations
- Simplify Some(exp) if exp == "GENERATE" to Some("GENERATE") pattern
  match (clippy::redundant_pattern_bind)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
